integration_scope: RND STEP opt-in actuator task only

L_Leg_ankle_pitch.range_method: operator-approved broad prior from zero through the passing-joint envelope
source_quality_reasons: Calibration design condition number exceeds 100.
Gravity/current calibration R2 is below 0.8.
Torque constant is too close to the optimizer bounds.

L_Leg_ankle_roll.range_method: operator-approved broad prior from zero through the passing-joint envelope
source_quality_reasons: Matched gravity torque span is below 0.05 Nm.
Gravity/current calibration R2 is below 0.8.
Bootstrap 90% torque-constant interval is wider than 30% of its median.
Torque constant is too close to the optimizer bounds.

L_Leg_hip_pitch.range_method: measured torque +/-25%, expanded to contain the Kt bootstrap interval

L_Leg_hip_roll.range_method: operator-approved broad prior from zero through the passing-joint envelope
source_quality_reasons: Torque constant is too close to the optimizer bounds.

R_Leg_knee.range_method: measured torque +/-25%, expanded to contain the Kt bootstrap interval

limitations: Passing values are effective low-current joint-domain fits, not pure motor constants.
Quality-rejected joints use an uncertainty prior; zero remains possible and no failed fit value is used.
The smooth Coulomb term excludes static breakaway and viscous friction to avoid unsupported parameters.
Mirrored joints share random quantiles while retaining their own measured or prior parameter ranges.
Motor strength is scaled before reapplying the configured actuator effort limit.
This training randomization layer has not itself passed hardware trajectory replay.
